arts.ttl: ‘Bukayo Saka wouldn’t get into Stoke City team’
arts.sum: Former Watford striker Troy Deeney has bizarrely claimed that Arsenal superstar Bukayo Saka wouldn’t get into Tony Pulis’ Stoke City team. After Arsenal beat Man Utd 2-0 on Wednesday thanks to two goals off set-pieces, the Gunners were compared to Stoke by former United striker Dimitar Berbatov.

arts.ttl: Arsenal drop early Gabriel team news hint vs Fulham as Mikel Arteta makes decision
arts.sum: Just days after that game, the club's official Instagram account posted a graphic, ahead of the Fulham match, that features a photo of Kiwior. Arsenal have hinted that Jakub Kiwior could start his second consecutive Premier League match when they play Fulham at Craven Cottage - with Gabriel Magalhaes facing a late fitness test.
